name: ExtensionCitation_Summary
title: R5: A human-readable display of key concepts to represent the citation (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Citation.summary` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Citation.summary` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Citation.summary` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Citation.summary` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Citation` is not mapped.
Element `Citation.summary` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
